headline: Verizon Satellite Venture Targets Dead Zones And Raises Valuation Questions
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) is joining AT&T and T-Mobile in a new joint venture focused on satellite based direct to device mobile coverage. The initiative targets mobile dead zones across the U.S., especially in rural and disaster prone regions, by linking smartphones directly to satellites. The move is framed as a response to potential competitive pressure from satellite focused entrants such as SpaceX's Starlink. For Verizon, one of the largest wireless carriers in the U.S., this...

headline: Here’s What the Street is Saying About T-Mobile US (TMUS)
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) is one of the best communication stocks to invest in. T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) received several rating updates following the release of its financial results for Q1 on April 28. Scotiabank cut the price target on the stock to $263 from $266 on April 29, reiterating an Outperform rating on the shares […]

headline: AT&T Inc. (T) Announces Launch of eSim for International Travelers
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is one of the best communication stocks to invest in. AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) announced on May 18 the launch of eSim for international travelers visiting the United States, Canada, and Mexico in the upcoming month for the summer’s big soccer games.
